name: Medical Prescription
description: Medical prescriptions — patient, doctor, medications, dosage.
instructions: Extract: patient full name, patient date of birth, doctor full name, doctor license number, clinic or hospital name, prescription date, validity date, medications as an array (each item: name + dosage + form (tablet/capsule/etc.) + frequency + duration + quantity), diagnosis code (if present), notes or special instructions. Mark fields not present in the document as null.
